name: Roulette Simulator 2025
short_description: Roulette Simulator 2025 offers players an incredible modern Roulette gambling simulation. Experience the emotions of gambling in real-time as you try to beat the roulette wheel as you bet on each spin.
detailed_description:
Roulette Simulator 2025 offers players an incredible modern Roulette gambling simulation. Experience the emotions of gambling in real-time as you try to beat the roulette wheel as you bet on each spin.

NEW FEATURES

  • Faster Spins!
  • Improved Roulette Wheel and Ball Physics.
  • Improved UI Betting Interface
  • Practice betting strategies to master the roulette wheel and earn great profits!
  • Build your bankroll with every winning bet.
  • Earn Roulette Achievements! (Steam Achievements integration)

Steam Features
  • Steam Achievements
